ActorFrame.OnCommand: %function(self) if GAMESTATE:GetEnv('class') ~= '000' then self:sleep(2.6); end; self:linear(.6); self:rotationz(150); self:zoomx(6.9); self:zoomy(3.45); end

ActorFrame.InitCommand: %function(self) local theta=(-GAMESTATE:GetEnv('rot')+00)*math.pi*2/21; self:x(math.sin(theta)*105); self:y(math.cos(theta)*105); self:z(math.cos(theta)*.1); self:zoomx(.45); self:zoomy(.45); end

ActorFrame.OnCommand: %function(self) if GAMESTATE:GetEnv('class') ~= '000' then self:sleep(2.6); end; self:linear(.3); self:rotationz(-75); self:zoom(.5); self:linear(.3); self:rotationz(-150); self:zoom(.3); end

ActorFrame.InitCommand: %function(self) local theta=(-GAMESTATE:GetEnv('rot')+01)*math.pi*2/21; self:x(math.sin(theta)*105); self:y(math.cos(theta)*105); self:z(math.cos(theta)*.1); self:zoomx(.45); self:zoomy(.45); end
